name: DJ's Clubhouse & Lounge
address: N81W15180 Appleton Ave, Menomonee Falls, WI 53051
about: DJ's Clubhouse & Lounge is a premium indoor golf and social lounge featuring four state-of-the-art Trackman IO simulator bays. It combines elite golf technology with a full bar and food service, creating a space for practice, competition, or casual enjoyment. The venue is open to players of all ages and skill levels, offering amenities like a comfortable lounge area and rental club sets. Operating hours are Tuesday-Thursday and Friday from 1pm-10pm, with extended weekend hours on Saturday and Sunday.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art Trackman IO technology for accurate shot tracking
Full bar and food service from DJ's Goalpost
Handicap calculation and data tracking after one round
Rental clubs available for all ages

food_and_drink.notes: Full menu available from DJ's Goalpost, viewed here

lefty_friendly: Yes, righty sets available; lefty sets not currently available

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: No, rental sets are available at no charge for right-handed players in various sizes (Tots, Junior, Men's/Women's). Left-handed rental sets are still being developed.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drink are not allowed as the venue offers a full bar and food service from DJ's Goalpost.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole round take?
faq.answer: While not explicitly stated, most simulator rounds take approximately 2-3 hours depending on group size and pace.

faq.question: Is this kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, players of all ages are welcome. Junior and tot-sized rental clubs are available, and the venue welcomes families.
